title: heleogiton tabernaemontani
intro: Heleogiton tabernaemontani, also known as the Mexican prickly poppy or Mexican silver poppy, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions, including insomnia, anxiety, and restlessness, due to its sedative and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Heleogiton tabernaemontani include promoting relaxation, reducing muscle spasms, and improving sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Heleogiton tabernaemontani can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
